activation_policy: activate when multiple modules are integrated
completion_gate: S12IntegrationConsistencyReport validates module inventory, assembly manifest, structured integrated candidate, trace index, audits, findings/backflow queue, validator report, CandidateArtifactReturn, and no PDF/final/untracked rewrite boundary
purpose: Compile a structured integrated manuscript candidate package and run consistency/backflow audits without PDF export, final acceptance, or uncontrolled rewriting.

subagent_lane_policy.rationale: Integration can create cross-section contradictions, so independent consistency verification is mandatory.

stage_quality_contract.active_profile_source: S10/S11 candidate returns plus active paper profile and S04-S08 controls; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: module_inventory that classifies included, missing, duplicate, stale, and excluded S10/S11 modules
assembly_manifest with source module versions and decisions
integrated_manuscript_candidate as a structured review object, not final prose or PDF
trace_index for claim, citation, terminology, object, figure, caption, and callout bindings
integration_findings with severity, evidence, affected artifact, nearest stage, and local repair scope
backflow_queue for S14 and CandidateArtifactReturn without export/final/acceptance claims

checks: every included text/figure/caption module has trace evidence and read receipts
integrated candidate is review-ready but not export-ready or final
claim, promise, terminology, object, figure-text, surface, stale, and backflow audits are complete
findings include nearest responsible stage and local repair scope
S12 performs no PDF export, final claim, or untracked rewrite

downstream_design_force: S13 reviews a structured S12 object with trace_index rather than a PDF or prose blob
S14 receives integration_findings/backflow_queue with nearest-stage hints
S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can reject export/readiness claims if S12 trace/audit closure is missing

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: module inventory, trace index, or critical consistency/backflow audit is missing
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: integrated candidate overclaims readiness, hides stale material, or lacks actionable findings
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local manifest, trace label, or wording issue without consistency/authority drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: reviewer-risk signal tracked for S13 without forced full integration rerun

stage_quality_contract.nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S12 owns integration/consistency and trace-index defects; source candidate defects route to S10/S11 or upstream controls by material source.
stage_quality_contract.anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH integration polish does not force S10/S11 regeneration unless the trace, claim, stale, or consistency audit shows substantive failure.
